name: MGO — Multi-chain Gas Optimizer
description: Real-time gas price comparison across up to 9 EVM chains. Returns cheapest chain recommendation with savings calculations. Pay-per-call via x402 on Base.

tools.name: get_gas_demo
tools.description: Free gas prices for 4 chains (rate limited)

tools.name: get_gas_premium
tools.description: 9-chain full gas comparison including BNB, Polygon, Avalanche, zkSync, Hyperliquid
